title: eruca sativa subsp. pinnatifida
intro: Eruca sativa subsp. pinnatifida, also known as garden rocket or pinnatifid rocket, is a subspecies of the Eruca sativa plant, a member of the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eruca sativa subsp. pinnatifida include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Eruca sativa subsp. pinnatifida include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
